safety_events.narrative_text: OFFICE CALLED AND SAID SOMETHING "SNAPPED" IN ONE THE HINGES WITHIN THE BOOM ARM DURING SURGERY AND THE NAVIGATION ASSEMBLY PARTIALLY DROPPED AND HIT THE DOCTOR. DOCTOR IS PHYSICALLY OKAY. OFFICE WILL CALL BACK WHEN THE MACHINE IS AVAILABLE TO TAKE PICTURES AND ASSESS THE DAMAGE, SO TECHNICAL SUPPORT CAN DETERMINE HOW TO MOVE FORWARD WITH THE REPAIR. CAMERAS AND LIGHTS ARE STILL FUNCTIONAL. PATIENT WAS NOT INVOLVED.

recalls.reason: The Handpiece Adaptor may have a manufacturing defect causing incorrect geometry. The incorrect geometry in turn causes the Handpiece Adaptor to not fit onto the doctor's dental handpiece.
recalls.product_description: X-Guide Handpiece Adaptor Sleeve 1, Model P010701
